title: Ripples of The Past: Stone Legacy Addon
description: A utility addon that does some survival-side changes to the power acquirement
body:
# Information about Stone Legacy addon.
- It gives a survival ways to get a Pillarman and Zombie NonPowers.
## How to get a Pillarman:
1. Find a Stone Fruit (Fruit item generated in: Jungle Temples (0.08), Basic Dungeons (0.04), Abandoned Mineshafts (0.05), Desert Pyramids (0.02))
2. Eat it (it gives a bleeding effect when no damage resistance effect is active, try to take it in a low light area)
3. You get a Pillarman.
Also, if you have a Hamon and you eat a fruit, you will get a Hamon Suicide ability.
## How to get a Zombie:
1. You must have a friend (or you) with Vampirism.
2. When entity are dying (red animation), you or your friend must use the "Zombie Summon" action (works with non-power entities like Hamon Master and players).
3. Entity get a zombie.
